experience.title: Conference Staff
experience.location: FAO Headquarters, Viale delle Terme di Caracalla 00153 Rome, Italy
experience.summary: Support the organization and execution of international conferences, workshops, and events hosted by the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO). Responsibilities include coordinating logistics, managing communications with participants, assisting with event setup and operations, and ensuring a smooth experience for attendees. This role provides valuable experience in event management, international collaboration, and organizational skills within a global context.
